items.name: theme
items.title: Crash Override theme
items.description: Brand tokens (oklch light+dark) + fonts. Install first.

items.name: layout
items.title: Layout primitives
items.description: Stack, Group, Center, Box, Grid — className-first flex/grid primitives with asChild support.

items.name: divider
items.title: Divider
items.description: Hairline rule (brand name for a separator). Horizontal or vertical. Thin alias that re-exports Separator.

items.name: separator
items.title: Separator
items.description: Hairline divider keyed to the --border token — horizontal or vertical, decorative by default. Built on Radix Separator.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Branded action button — neon-lime primary, outline secondary, cobalt enterprise, quiet ghost.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: Flat surface primitive — slate card bg, hairline border, no heavy shadow. Optional capability accent bar and interactive hover.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Status / label pill keyed to the brand palette. Lowercase mono voice, soft + outline fills, optional leading dot.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: Text field on the dark surface — hairline --input border, neon focus ring, sharp brand radius.

items.name: label
items.title: Label
items.description: Form field label in the brand's uppercase mono voice. Built on Radix Label for click-to-focus.

items.name: field
items.title: Field
items.description: Composes Label + control + help/error into one accessible field. Wires aria-describedby and aria-invalid onto the control.

items.name: textarea
items.title: Textarea
items.description: Multi-line text input on the dark surface — hairline --input border, neon focus ring, vertical resize.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: Dropdown select matching the Input voice — hairline --input trigger, neon focus ring, popover content with neon check on selected items.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: Square control — hairline --input box, neon --primary fill with dark check glyph when checked. Sharp brand radius.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: On/off toggle — hairline --input track when off, neon --primary fill when on. Themes in light and dark.

items.name: radio-group
items.title: RadioGroup
items.description: Single-select group — hairline --input circles, selected item border + dot in neon --primary. Neon focus ring.

items.name: slider
items.title: Slider
items.description: Range slider — hairline --input track, neon --primary filled range, round --background thumbs with a primary focus ring. Single or multi-thumb.

items.name: toggle
items.title: Toggle
items.description: Two-state toggle button — quiet muted voice, lifts to --accent when pressed. Mono label, sharp radius. Default and outline variants.

items.name: toggle-group
items.title: ToggleGroup
items.description: Segmented set of toggles — single or multiple. Items join into one sharp control with hairline dividers; pressed segment fills --accent. Built on Toggle.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: Centered modal over a dimmed, lightly blurred scrim. Panel on the --popover surface with a hairline border, sharp brand radius, brand-voice title and muted description. Built on Radix Dialog.

items.name: sheet
items.title: Sheet
items.description: Edge-anchored side panel sliding in over a scrim — right (default), left, top, or bottom. --popover surface with a single hairline border on the anchored edge. Built on Radix Dialog.

items.name: drawer
items.title: Drawer
items.description: Bottom drawer with a grab handle (mobile-first), sliding up over a scrim. --popover surface, sharp top corners, muted handle. Built on vaul.

items.name: popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: Rich floating content anchored to a trigger; click to toggle, click-away closes. --popover surface with a hairline border, sharp brand radius, soft shadow. Built on Radix Popover.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: Hover/focus tooltip in the brand's compact mono voice on the --popover surface with a hairline border. Wrap your app (or a subtree) in TooltipProvider. Built on Radix Tooltip.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.title: DropdownMenu
items.description: Click-triggered menu on the --popover surface — highlighted row lifts to --accent, uppercase mono labels, muted shortcuts, neon check/dot indicators, destructive item variant. Built on Radix DropdownMenu.

items.name: command
items.title: Command
items.description: Keyboard-first command palette in the brand's terminal flavour — search input over grouped, filterable items on the --popover surface, uppercase mono group headings, --accent highlighted row, muted mono shortcuts. Includes CommandDialog (palette in a centered modal). Built on cmdk.

items.name: combobox
items.title: Combobox
items.description: Autocomplete input + filtered dropdown — composes Popover and Command. A trigger button opens a popover holding a searchable command list with a neon check on the selected option. No new Radix package.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: Underline tab strip for switching views or filters. The active tab carries a neon --primary underline and a bright label; inactive tabs run muted. Mono voice, hairline baseline. Built on Radix Tabs.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: Stacked disclosure panels inside a hairline-bordered, sharp-radius container — mono trigger rows with a chevron that rotates on open, muted body copy. Single-open by default; set type="multiple" to allow many. Built on Radix Accordion.

items.name: collapsible
items.title: Collapsible
items.description: Single expandable region driven by your own trigger. Content slides/fades in on open. Built on Radix Collapsible.

items.name: alert-dialog
items.title: AlertDialog
items.description: Confirm/destructive modal over a dimmed scrim — title, description, Cancel + Action buttons. The action maps to --primary, or --destructive when destructive. --popover surface, hairline border, sharp brand radius. Built on Radix AlertDialog.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: Semantic data table set — hairline --border row rules, an uppercase mono header voice, and rows that lift to --accent on hover. Right-align mono numerics via className. Includes Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableFooter, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell, TableCaption.

items.name: alert
items.title: Alert
items.description: Inline message banner — flat tinted fill, hairline border, and a 3px left accent. Variants map to the brand status palette: default, info (cobalt), success (neon), warning (amber), destructive (red). Mono title, muted body, optional leading lucide icon.

items.name: progress
items.title: Progress
items.description: Determinate progress bar — a neon --primary fill riding a muted track with a rounded cap and a smooth width transition. Built on Radix Progress.

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Skeleton
items.description: Loading placeholder block — a muted --muted surface with a subtle pulse. Size it with utilities and compose several to mimic a layout.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: Circular user mark — renders an image, falling back to up-to-two mono initials on a muted surface. Sizes xs|sm|md|lg; ring adds a neon accent border. Includes Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback and an initials() helper. Built on Radix Avatar.

items.name: scroll-area
items.title: ScrollArea
items.description: Scroll container with a slim, brand-styled scrollbar — the thumb runs on the --border token, the track stays transparent. Set a height and overflow content scrolls. Built on Radix ScrollArea.

items.name: spinner
items.title: Spinner
items.description: Indeterminate loading indicator — a spinning lucide ring tinted with the neon --primary. Inherits the current font size so it lines up inside buttons and labels. Carries role=status.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.title: Breadcrumb
items.description: Hierarchical path — muted mono links that lift to the foreground, bold current page. Composable shadcn structure with slot-based links and separators.

items.name: pagination
items.title: Pagination
items.description: Page navigation with prev/next + numbered cells in the brand mono voice — the active page lifts to the neon --primary fill, the rest stay quiet. Reuses the Button styling.

items.name: navigation-menu
items.title: NavigationMenu
items.description: Horizontal site nav with mega-menu dropdowns — display-voice triggers that lift to --accent, a viewport floating on the --popover surface. Built on Radix NavigationMenu.

items.name: context-menu
items.title: ContextMenu
items.description: Right-click menu opened at the cursor — popover surface, hairline border, mono uppercase labels, destructive items mapped to the --destructive token. Built on Radix ContextMenu.

items.name: hover-card
items.title: HoverCard
items.description: Preview card on hover/focus for a user or repo mention — floats on the --popover surface with a hairline border and sharp brand radius. Built on Radix HoverCard.

items.name: menubar
items.title: Menubar
items.description: Desktop-style persistent menu bar — bordered bar with display-voice triggers, each menu dropping onto the --popover surface and sharing the dropdown row styling. Built on Radix Menubar.

items.name: use-mobile
items.title: useIsMobile
items.description: Reports whether the viewport is below the 768px mobile breakpoint. Used by the Sidebar to swap the docked rail for a Sheet on small screens.

items.name: sidebar
items.title: Sidebar
items.description: Collapsible app left rail on the --sidebar-* tokens — provider + icon rail, neon left-border active state, Sheet on mobile. The full shadcn sidebar set composing Sheet, Tooltip, Separator, Skeleton, Button and Input.

items.name: icon-button
items.title: IconButton
items.description: Square, icon-only action for dense chrome — toolbars, panel headers, table rows. Ghost / outline / solid variants, sizes sm/md/lg. Requires a label (sets aria-label + tooltip).

items.name: button-group
items.title: ButtonGroup
items.description: Joins related Buttons into one segmented control with shared borders — inner corners square off and adjacent hairlines collapse. Horizontal or vertical.

items.name: aspect-ratio
items.title: AspectRatio
items.description: Constrains children to a fixed width:height ratio (e.g. 16/9). Set object-cover on media to crop cleanly. Built on Radix AspectRatio.

items.name: input-group
items.title: InputGroup
items.description: An Input joined with leading/trailing addons into one bordered control — addons sit on the --secondary surface in the mono voice; the group carries the hairline border and neon focus-within ring. Composes Input.

items.name: input-otp
items.title: InputOTP
items.description: One-time-passcode field — auto-advancing, paste-aware mono cells on the hairline --input border; the active cell lights its border + ring with neon --ring and shows a blinking caret. Built on the input-otp package.

items.name: native-select
items.title: NativeSelect
items.description: A lightly-styled native <select> for simple, accessible cases (no custom popover). Matches the Input voice — hairline --input border, neon focus ring — with a brand chevron. Pass options or <option> children.

items.name: resizable
items.title: Resizable
items.description: Panels split by a draggable handle — a hairline --border rule that lights to neon --ring on focus, with an optional grip badge on the --secondary surface. Built on react-resizable-panels (v4).

items.name: carousel
items.title: Carousel
items.description: Horizontal (or vertical) slide carousel with prev/next controls that reuse the brand IconButton and disable at the ends. Keyboard + paste aware. Built on embla-carousel-react.

items.name: toaster
items.title: Toaster
items.description: Stacked toast system on the brand surfaces — mount one <Toaster /> near the app root and fire toasts with the re-exported toast(). Theme is read from the document root (.dark / .light / [data-theme]), so no next-themes provider is needed. Built on sonner.
